name: python3-pyqt6.qtwebchannel
title: python3-pyqt6.qtwebchannel
summary: Python bindings for Qt 6 WebChannel module
description:
Python bindings for Qt 6 WebChannel module
Qt WebChannel API enables peer-to-peer communication between a server and a
client (HTML/JavaScript or QML application).
.
This package contains the QtWebChannel module of PyQt6.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pyqt6.qtwebchannel because Python bindings for Qt 6 WebChannel module.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pyqt6.qtwebchannel as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pyqt6.qtwebchannel with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pyqt6.qtwebchannel --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
